NAME: CKB — Alcohol and vascular disease (ALDH2 MR)
DESCRIPTION: Conventional and genetic evidence on alcohol and vascular disease in 500,000 Chinese adults. Used ALDH2 Mendelian randomization to demonstrate moderate alcohol does not protect against stroke, challenging the J-shaped curve hypothesis.
TITLE: Conventional and genetic evidence on alcohol and vascular disease aetiology: a prospective study of 500,000 men and women in China
